# pi-pompom

> A 3D raymarched virtual pet companion for Pi CLI terminals.

## What It Does

Pompom is a terminal widget that renders an animated 3D creature above the Pi editor using Unicode half-block characters. It has physics, AI behaviors, particle effects, and responds to keyboard shortcuts and slash commands.

## Key Capabilities

- Real-time raymarched 3D rendering with 4x4 supersampled anti-aliasing
- 12 interactive states: idle, walk, flip, sleep, excited, chasing, fetching, singing, dance, offscreen, peek
- Cross-platform keyboard shortcuts (macOS Option, Windows/Linux Alt, Kitty protocol)
- Hunger/energy needs system with visual status bars
- 4 color themes, day/night cycle, particle effects, speech bubbles

## Usage

```bash
pi install @codexstar/pi-pompom
```

Then in Pi: `/pompom on`, `/pompom help` for commands.

## File Index

- [README.md](README.md): Full documentation with commands, shortcuts, and features
- [extensions/pompom.ts](extensions/pompom.ts): Core renderer, physics, shading, and public API
- [extensions/pompom-extension.ts](extensions/pompom-extension.ts): Pi extension lifecycle, commands, keyboard input
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
